name: pantheon-ai/moscow-prioritization
summary: Prioritize product requirements with the MoSCoW framework in a deterministic way.  Use when teams need to define MVP scope, sequence releases, resolve stakeholder conflicts,  prevent scope creep, or rebalance backlog under time, budget, or staffing constraints.  Keywords: moscow, must should could wont, requirement prioritization, backlog, mvp,  release planning, scope control, stakeholder alignment.
